channel.title: Exploration on About machines that learn
channel.description: Recent content in Exploration on About machines that learn

item.title: Self-Imitation Learning
item.description: Key Idea: Try to reinforce an agent's past behaviour if it led to return that's better than what is currently expected. Maintain past episodes in a replay buffer. Given a state, imitate a past action if it resulted in return that was higher than the current critic's value estimate. Can be applied to any actor-critic architecture. It does not require any off-policy correction like importance weighting. Indirectly improves exploration.
